---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Documentation Instructions

- Keep `AGENTS.md` as the canonical agent contract.
- Keep human-facing setup and usage in `README.md`.
- Put detailed project docs in `docs/`.
- When changing one agent wrapper, check whether `CLAUDE.md`, `GEMINI.md`, `.github/copilot-instructions.md`, `.cursor/rules/`, `.devin/rules/`, `.windsurf/rules/`, or `.agents/skills/` also needs alignment.
